s-1.title: It makes me / helps me + V
s-1.meaning: Nó khiến tôi / giúp tôi làm gì
s-1.example: It helps me reduce stress after a long day.

s-2.title: It is a good / effective way to + V
s-2.meaning: Đây là một cách tốt để làm gì
s-2.example: Reading is an effective way to broaden my knowledge.

s-3.title: I find it + adj + to + V
s-3.meaning: Tôi thấy thật (như thế nào) để làm gì
s-3.example: I find it comfortable to live in Dalat.

s-4.title: It is + adj + for sb + to + V
s-4.meaning: Thật (như thế nào) cho ai đó để làm gì
s-4.example: It is important for students to learn English.

s-5.title: Thanks to A, I can...
s-5.meaning: Nhờ có A, tôi có thể...
s-5.example: Thanks to my smartphone, I can connect with friends.

s-6.title: The thing I like most about... is...
s-6.meaning: Điều tôi thích nhất về ... là ...
s-6.example: The thing I like most about travelling is discovering new cultures.

s-7.title: Nối bằng and, but, so, or
s-7.meaning: Ghép 2 câu đơn bằng từ nối
s-7.example: I wanted to go out, but it rained heavily.

s-8.title: Mệnh đề thời gian: when, before, after
s-8.meaning: Thêm mệnh đề thời gian vào câu
s-8.example: When I get home, I always check my phone.

s-9.title: If + hiện tại, will + V
s-9.meaning: Câu điều kiện — điều có thể xảy ra
s-9.example: If you exercise regularly, you will stay healthy.

p-increase.title: increase + N
p-increase.example: Travelling increases our knowledge about the world.

p-improve.title: improve + N
p-improve.example: I want to improve my English skills.

p-lack.title: lack + N
p-lack.example: Many students lack confidence when speaking.

p-solve.title: solve + N
p-solve.example: We need to solve the traffic problem.

p-support.title: support + N/sb
p-support.example: He works hard to support his family.

c-first.title: first / firstly
c-first.example: First, I wake up at six o'clock.

c-finally.title: finally
c-finally.example: Finally, I review my notes before bed.

c-also.title: also
c-also.example: I enjoy cooking. I also like gardening.

c-however.title: however
c-however.example: Fast food is cheap. However, it is not healthy.

c-although.title: although
c-although.example: Although the weather was bad, we went out.

c-because.title: because
c-because.example: I exercise because it keeps me healthy.

c-so.title: so
c-so.example: It rained heavily, so we stayed at home.

c-for-example.title: for example
c-for-example.example: I like outdoor activities. For example, I go hiking.

c-moreover.title: moreover
c-moreover.example: The city is beautiful. Moreover, it is very safe.

c-in-conclusion.title: in conclusion
c-in-conclusion.example: In conclusion, technology has many benefits.

c-in-my-opinion.title: in my opinion
c-in-my-opinion.example: In my opinion, family is the most important thing.

v-advantage.title: advantage
v-advantage.example: One advantage of living in a city is convenience.

v-disadvantage.title: disadvantage
v-disadvantage.example: The main disadvantage is the high cost of living.

v-benefit.title: benefit
v-benefit.example: There are many benefits of regular exercise.

v-solution.title: solution
v-solution.example: Education is the best solution for reducing poverty.

v-important.title: important
v-important.example: English is very important for my future career.

v-effective.title: effective
v-effective.example: This is an effective way to improve your English.

v-serious.title: serious
v-serious.example: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
